title: AI infra crawler scheduled refresh manifest, 2026-07-05 to 2026-07-07
scope_note: Scheduled crawler Markdown snapshots admitted as raw evidence. SGLang entries are page-level issue/PR snapshots after the API corpus cutoff, not a full API refresh with joined comments or review comments. NCCL arXiv/blog entries are discovery or source-refresh evidence unless separately promoted by cited wiki pages. The H200 entry is a product-page refresh for an already represented accelerator source profile.
